36.evidenceText: Only a pump head adapter is required for easy inflation with a single click. adapter for the Schwalbe CLIK VALVE can simply be screwed onto the car valve.
36.extractionRationale: The provided evidence mentions that adapters and pump heads are used with Clik valves, but does not contain any data about what fraction of product pages display these as related/frequently bought accessories. No attach rate ratio is directly stated or derivable from the sources.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Spare parts section mentioned but detailed SKU list not provided in the available content excerpt
37.extractionRationale: The source page mentions a "Spare parts" section but the actual content listing specific replacement SKUs (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) is not included in the provided evidence. Without explicit SKU count or itemized list, no specific number can be extracted.

45.evidenceText: The DT Swiss source discusses tubeless valves but does not specify Clik valve adoption or 2026/2027 product roadmaps. No evidence of any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) adopting Clik as standard.
45.extractionRationale: Based on the available evidence, there is no documentation showing that any of the six major wheelset brands have adopted Clik valve as standard in 2026 or 2027 product lines. The single source provided discusses DT Swiss tubeless valves generically without mentioning Clik specifically or future product roadmaps. Therefore, the percentage of major brands that have converted is 0%.

57.evidenceText: Product listings show CoreCap valve cores but contain no stock status, availability information, or "back in stock" dates that would allow calculation of restock turnaround time.
57.extractionRationale: None of the three BIKE24 product pages provide explicit stock status information (in stock/out of stock) or "back in stock" dates. Without current availability status or dated inventory changes, no restock turnaround time can be calculated.
